/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libfind_substring_positions_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libfind_substring_positions_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/find_substring_positions_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/find_substring_positions_interfaces/action/find_substring_positions__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/li/Downloads/hw4/hw4/build/find_substring_positions_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libfind_substring_positions_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
